---
title: "Long Island Clustering Workflow v2.0"
subtitle: "Corrected and Strengthened --- Based on Audit Report"
author: "AMS 597 Project Team"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r helpers, include=FALSE}
ordered_weekdays <- c(
  "Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday",
  "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday"
)

weather_group_map <- list(
  Clear = c("Fair", "Clear", "Fair / Windy"),
  Cloudy = c(
    "Mostly Cloudy", "Partly Cloudy", "Scattered Clouds", "Overcast", "Cloudy",
    "Mostly Cloudy / Windy", "Partly Cloudy / Windy", "Cloudy / Windy"
  ),
  Rain = c(
    "Light Rain", "Rain", "Heavy Rain", "Light Drizzle", "Light Rain / Windy",
    "Heavy Rain / Windy", "Drizzle"
  ),
  Snow_Ice = c(
    "Light Snow", "Snow", "Heavy Snow", "Wintry Mix",
    "Light Freezing Rain", "Ice Pellets", "Sleet"
  ),
  Fog_Haze = c("Fog", "Haze", "Smoke", "Mist", "Patches of Fog", "Shallow Fog"),
  # v2.0: Thunderstorm moved from grepl fallback to explicit lookup
  Thunderstorm = c(
    "Thunderstorm", "Thunder", "Thunder / Windy",
    "Thunderstorm / Windy", "Heavy Thunderstorm",
    "Light Thunderstorm", "Thunderstorms and Rain"
  )
)

normalize_wind_direction <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x_upper <- toupper(x)

  mapped <- dplyr::case_when(
    x_upper %in% c("N", "NORTH") ~ "N",
    x_upper %in% c("NE", "NORTHEAST", "NORTH EAST") ~ "NE",
    x_upper %in% c("E", "EAST") ~ "E",
    x_upper %in% c("SE", "SOUTHEAST", "SOUTH EAST") ~ "SE",
    x_upper %in% c("S", "SOUTH") ~ "S",
    x_upper %in% c("SW", "SOUTHWEST", "SOUTH WEST") ~ "SW",
    x_upper %in% c("W", "WEST") ~ "W",
    x_upper %in% c("NW", "NORTHWEST", "NORTH WEST") ~ "NW",
    x_upper %in% c("CALM", "VARIABLE", "VAR") ~ "Variable_Calm",
    TRUE ~ "Variable_Calm"
  )

  factor(
    mapped,
    levels = c("N", "NE", "E", "SE", "S", "SW", "W", "NW", "Variable_Calm")
  )
}

mode_value <- function(x) {
  values <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (!length(values)) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }

  names(sort(table(values), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
}

dominant_share <- function(x) {
  values <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (!length(values)) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }

  max(prop.table(table(values)))
}

wrap_label <- function(x, width = 24) {
  vapply(
    as.character(x),
    function(value) paste(strwrap(value, width = width), collapse = "\n"),
    character(1)
  )
}

rescale01 <- function(x) {
  rng <- range(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(rng[1]) || !is.finite(rng[2]) || diff(rng) == 0) {
    return(rep(0.5, length(x)))
  }

  (x - rng[1]) / diff(rng)
}
```

# Phase 1: Environment and Reproducibility Setup

This file is the main reproducible workflow for the Long Island clustering analysis. It is meant to run from a clean R session and use `li_accidents_clean.csv` as the only project dataset input.

```{r phase-1-config}
required_packages <- c(
  "data.table",
  "dplyr",
  "lubridate",
  "clustMixType",
  "dbscan",
  "cluster",
  "fpc",
  "ggplot2",
  "ggrepel",
  "geosphere",
  "factoextra",
  "knitr",
  "rmarkdown"
)

optional_packages <- c("plotly", "htmlwidgets")

missing_packages <- required_packages[
  !vapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)
]

if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste(
      "Install these packages before running the full workflow:",
      paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", ")
    )
  )
}

invisible(lapply(required_packages, library, character.only = TRUE))

set.seed(42)

input_path <- "../li_accidents_clean.csv"
output_dir <- "local_artifacts/output"
run_profile <- "consensus_16gb"

if (!run_profile %in% c("local_safe", "consensus_16gb", "full_srs")) {
  stop("run_profile must be one of 'local_safe', 'consensus_16gb', or 'full_srs'.")
}

phase6_validation_mode <- dplyr::case_when(
  run_profile == "full_srs" ~ "full",
  run_profile == "consensus_16gb" ~ "consensus_sampled",
  TRUE ~ "sampled"
)
phase6_validation_sample_n <- dplyr::case_when(
  run_profile == "full_srs" ~ NA_integer_,
  run_profile == "consensus_16gb" ~ 4000L,
  TRUE ~ 5000L
)
phase6_validation_repeats <- dplyr::case_when(
  run_profile == "consensus_16gb" ~ 4L,
  TRUE ~ 1L
)

phase6_stability_mode <- dplyr::case_when(
  run_profile == "full_srs" ~ "full",
  run_profile == "consensus_16gb" ~ "consensus_sampled",
  TRUE ~ "sampled"
)
phase6_stability_sample_n <- dplyr::case_when(
  run_profile == "full_srs" ~ NA_integer_,
  run_profile == "consensus_16gb" ~ 2500L,
  TRUE ~ 3000L
)
phase6_stability_repeats <- dplyr::case_when(
  run_profile == "consensus_16gb" ~ 3L,
  TRUE ~ 1L
)
phase6_stability_bootstraps <- dplyr::case_when(
  run_profile == "full_srs" ~ 50L,
  run_profile == "consensus_16gb" ~ 10L,
  TRUE ~ 15L
)
phase9_interactive_mode <- "auto"

interactive_exports_enabled <- dplyr::case_when(
  phase9_interactive_mode == "off" ~ FALSE,
  phase9_interactive_mode == "on" ~ all(
    vapply(optional_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)
  ),
  phase9_interactive_mode == "auto" ~ all(
    vapply(optional_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)
  ),
  TRUE ~ FALSE
)

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

if (!file.exists(input_path)) {
  stop("Expected input file not found: ", input_path)
}

phase_1_check <- data.frame(
  item = c(
    "Input dataset",
    "Output directory",
    "Seed",
    "Run profile",
    "Phase 6 validation mode",
    "Phase 6 sample size",
    "Phase 6 validation repeats",
    "Phase 6 stability mode",
    "Phase 6 stability sample size",
    "Phase 6 stability repeats",
    "Phase 6 stability bootstraps",
    "Phase 9 interactive mode",
    "Working directory"
  ),
  value = c(
    normalizePath(input_path, winslash = "/"),
    normalizePath(output_dir, winslash = "/"),
    "42",
    run_profile,
    phase6_validation_mode,
    ifelse(is.na(phase6_validation_sample_n), "Full data", as.character(phase6_validation_sample_n)),
    as.character(phase6_validation_repeats),
    phase6_stability_mode,
    ifelse(is.na(phase6_stability_sample_n), "Full data", as.character(phase6_stability_sample_n)),
    as.character(phase6_stability_repeats),
    as.character(phase6_stability_bootstraps),
    ifelse(
      interactive_exports_enabled,
      "Enabled",
      ifelse(phase9_interactive_mode == "off", "Off for safe local runs", "Packages missing")
    ),
    normalizePath(".", winslash = "/")
  )
)

knitr::kable(phase_1_check, caption = "Phase 1 setup check")
```

```{r load-data-preview}
df_raw <- data.table::fread(input_path, showProgress = FALSE)

data_overview <- data.frame(
  rows = nrow(df_raw),
  columns = ncol(df_raw),
  source_file = basename(input_path)
)

knitr::kable(data_overview, caption = "Input file loaded successfully")
```

# Phase 2: Data Ingestion and Raw Profiling

This phase stays read-only. The goal is to confirm that the cleaned Long Island dataset matches the expectations in the execution plan before any feature engineering starts.

```{r phase-2-dimension-checks}
expected_rows <- 33375L
expected_cols <- 48L

if (nrow(df_raw) != expected_rows || ncol(df_raw) != expected_cols) {
  stop(
    paste0(
      "Unexpected dataset dimensions. Expected ",
      expected_rows, " rows and ", expected_cols, " columns, got ",
      nrow(df_raw), " rows and ", ncol(df_raw), " columns."
    )
  )
}

phase_2_dimensions <- data.frame(
  metric = c("Rows", "Columns"),
  expected = c(expected_rows, expected_cols),
  observed = c(nrow(df_raw), ncol(df_raw))
)

knitr::kable(phase_2_dimensions, caption = "Phase 2 dimension check")
```

```{r phase-2-county-and-severity}
county_profile <- as.data.table(df_raw)[, .N, by = County][order(match(County, c("Nassau", "Suffolk", "Queens")))]
severity_profile <- as.data.table(df_raw)[, .N, by = Severity][order(as.integer(Severity))]

expected_counties <- data.table(
  County = c("Nassau", "Suffolk", "Queens"),
  expected_n = c(19390L, 13838L, 147L)
)

expected_severity <- data.table(
  Severity = c(1L, 2L, 3L, 4L),
  expected_n = c(161L, 28357L, 3938L, 919L)
)

county_check <- merge(expected_counties, county_profile, by = "County", all.x = TRUE)
severity_check <- merge(
  expected_severity,
  severity_profile[, Severity := as.integer(Severity)],
  by = "Severity",
  all.x = TRUE
)

if (any(county_check$expected_n != county_check$N)) {
  stop("County counts do not match the execution plan expectations.")
}

if (any(severity_check$expected_n != severity_check$N)) {
  stop("Severity counts do not match the execution plan expectations.")
}

fwrite(county_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase2_county_profile.csv"))
fwrite(severity_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase2_severity_profile.csv"))

knitr::kable(county_check, caption = "County profile check")
knitr::kable(severity_check, caption = "Severity profile check")
```

```{r phase-2-missingness}
missingness_profile <- data.table(
  column = names(df_raw),
  missing_n = vapply(df_raw, function(column) sum(is.na(column)), integer(1)),
  missing_pct = round(vapply(df_raw, function(column) mean(is.na(column)) * 100, numeric(1)), 2)
)[order(-missing_pct, column)]

missingness_focus <- missingness_profile[
  column %in% c("End_Lat", "End_Lng", "Precipitation(in)", "Wind_Chill(F)")
]

fwrite(missingness_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase2_missingness_profile.csv"))

knitr::kable(head(missingness_profile, 12), caption = "Top missingness profile")
knitr::kable(missingness_focus, caption = "Critical missingness checks")
```

```{r phase-2-binary-flags}
binary_flag_profile <- data.table(
  flag = c("Bump", "Roundabout", "Turning_Loop", "Traffic_Calming", "No_Exit"),
  true_count = vapply(
    df_raw[, c("Bump", "Roundabout", "Turning_Loop", "Traffic_Calming", "No_Exit")],
    function(column) sum(as.logical(column), na.rm = TRUE),
    integer(1)
  )
)

binary_flag_profile[, true_pct := round(100 * true_count / nrow(df_raw), 4)]

fwrite(binary_flag_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase2_binary_flag_profile.csv"))

knitr::kable(binary_flag_profile, caption = "Near-zero binary flag checks")
```

```{r phase-2-duration-distance}
duration_values <- as.numeric(df_raw$Duration_Minutes)
distance_values <- as.numeric(df_raw[["Distance(mi)"]])

duration_profile <- data.table(
  metric = c(
    "Median duration",
    "Mean duration",
    "Max duration",
    "Rows above 1 day",
    "Rows above 1 week",
    "99th percentile"
  ),
  value = c(
    median(duration_values, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(duration_values, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(duration_values, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(duration_values > 1440, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(duration_values > 10080, na.rm = TRUE),
    as.numeric(quantile(duration_values, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE))
  )
)

distance_profile <- data.table(
  metric = c("Zero-distance rows", "Zero-distance pct", "Max distance"),
  value = c(
    sum(distance_values == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    100 * mean(distance_values == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(distance_values, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)

fwrite(duration_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase2_duration_profile.csv"))
fwrite(distance_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase2_distance_profile.csv"))

knitr::kable(duration_profile, caption = "Duration anomaly profile")
knitr::kable(distance_profile, caption = "Distance profile")
```

```{r phase-2-wind-and-weather}
wind_direction_profile <- as.data.table(df_raw)[, .N, by = Wind_Direction][order(-N, Wind_Direction)]
weather_profile <- as.data.table(df_raw)[, .N, by = Weather_Condition][order(-N, Weather_Condition)]

wind_focus <- wind_direction_profile[
  Wind_Direction %in% c("N", "North", "S", "South", "E", "East", "W", "West")
]

fwrite(wind_direction_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase2_wind_direction_profile.csv"))
fwrite(weather_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase2_weather_profile.csv"))

knitr::kable(wind_focus, caption = "Wind direction duplicate label check")
knitr::kable(head(weather_profile, 12), caption = "Top weather labels")
```

```{r phase-2-summary}
profiling_summary <- data.table(
  finding = c(
    "Dimensions match the execution plan",
    "County counts match the Long Island scope",
    "Severity counts match the execution plan",
    "End_Lat and End_Lng remain heavily missing",
    "Precipitation and Wind_Chill remain too sparse for core clustering use",
    "Five binary roadway flags carry no signal",
    "Duration still shows extreme right-tail outliers",
    "Distance includes many zero values",
    "Wind direction labels need normalization",
    "Weather labels still need grouping before clustering"
  ),
  status = c(
    "Confirmed",
    "Confirmed",
    "Confirmed",
    "Confirmed",
    "Confirmed",
    "Confirmed",
    "Confirmed",
    "Confirmed",
    "Confirmed",
    "Confirmed"
  )
)

fwrite(profiling_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase2_profiling_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(profiling_summary, caption = "Phase 2 profiling summary")
```

# Phase 3: Feature Engineering

This phase derives the analysis-ready fields needed for the clustering inputs while keeping the original cleaned dataset unchanged in `df_raw`.

```{r phase-3-start}
df_phase3 <- as.data.table(copy(df_raw))
```

```{r phase-3-temporal-features}
df_phase3[, Start_Time_Parsed := lubridate::ymd_hms(Start_Time, quiet = TRUE)]

df_phase3[, hour := lubridate::hour(Start_Time_Parsed)]
df_phase3[, month := lubridate::month(Start_Time_Parsed)]
df_phase3[, weekday := factor(
  weekdays(as.Date(Start_Time_Parsed)),
  levels = ordered_weekdays,
  ordered = TRUE
)]
df_phase3[, weekend := weekdays(as.Date(Start_Time_Parsed)) %in% c("Saturday", "Sunday")]
df_phase3[, hour_band := dplyr::case_when(
  hour >= 0 & hour <= 5 ~ "Early_AM",
  hour >= 6 & hour <= 9 ~ "AM_Rush",
  hour >= 10 & hour <= 14 ~ "Midday",
  hour >= 15 & hour <= 18 ~ "PM_Rush",
  hour >= 19 & hour <= 21 ~ "Evening",
  hour >= 22 & hour <= 23 ~ "Late_Night",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)]
df_phase3[, hour_band := factor(
  hour_band,
  levels = c("Early_AM", "AM_Rush", "Midday", "PM_Rush", "Evening", "Late_Night"),
  ordered = TRUE
)]
df_phase3[, season := dplyr::case_when(
  month %in% c(12L, 1L, 2L) ~ "Winter",
  month %in% c(3L, 4L, 5L) ~ "Spring",
  month %in% c(6L, 7L, 8L) ~ "Summer",
  month %in% c(9L, 10L, 11L) ~ "Fall",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)]
df_phase3[, season := factor(
  season,
  levels = c("Winter", "Spring", "Summer", "Fall"),
  ordered = TRUE
)]
df_phase3[, rush_hour := hour %in% c(6L, 7L, 8L, 9L, 15L, 16L, 17L, 18L)]

temporal_na_check <- data.table(
  feature = c("Start_Time_Parsed", "hour", "month", "weekday", "weekend", "hour_band", "season", "rush_hour"),
  missing_n = c(
    sum(is.na(df_phase3$Start_Time_Parsed)),
    sum(is.na(df_phase3$hour)),
    sum(is.na(df_phase3$month)),
    sum(is.na(df_phase3$weekday)),
    sum(is.na(df_phase3$weekend)),
    sum(is.na(df_phase3$hour_band)),
    sum(is.na(df_phase3$season)),
    sum(is.na(df_phase3$rush_hour))
  )
)

if (any(temporal_na_check$missing_n > 0)) {
  stop("Phase 3 temporal feature derivation created unexpected missing values.")
}

fwrite(temporal_na_check, file.path(output_dir, "phase3_temporal_check.csv"))

knitr::kable(temporal_na_check, caption = "Phase 3 temporal feature check")
```

```{r phase-3-duration}
duration_values <- as.numeric(df_phase3$Duration_Minutes)
duration_cap_99 <- as.numeric(quantile(duration_values, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE))
df_phase3[, Duration_cap := pmin(duration_values, duration_cap_99)]
df_phase3[, log_Duration := log1p(Duration_cap)]

duration_engineering_summary <- data.table(
  metric = c("99th percentile cap", "Median log_Duration", "Max log_Duration"),
  value = c(
    duration_cap_99,
    median(df_phase3$log_Duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(df_phase3$log_Duration, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)

fwrite(duration_engineering_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase3_duration_engineering.csv"))

knitr::kable(duration_engineering_summary, caption = "Phase 3 duration treatment")
```

```{r phase-3-weather-group}
weather_counts <- as.data.table(df_phase3)[, .N, by = Weather_Condition]
rare_weather <- weather_counts[N < 30, Weather_Condition]

df_phase3[, weather_group := dplyr::case_when(
  Weather_Condition %in% weather_group_map$Clear       ~ "Clear",
  Weather_Condition %in% weather_group_map$Cloudy      ~ "Cloudy",
  Weather_Condition %in% weather_group_map$Rain        ~ "Rain",
  Weather_Condition %in% weather_group_map$Snow_Ice    ~ "Snow_Ice",
  Weather_Condition %in% weather_group_map$Fog_Haze    ~ "Fog_Haze",
  # v2.0: explicit lookup first; grepl catches novel variants not in the map
  Weather_Condition %in% weather_group_map$Thunderstorm ~ "Thunderstorm",
  grepl("Thunder", Weather_Condition, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Thunderstorm",
  Weather_Condition %in% rare_weather ~ "Other",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)]

df_phase3[, weather_group := factor(
  weather_group,
  levels = c("Clear", "Cloudy", "Rain", "Snow_Ice", "Fog_Haze", "Thunderstorm", "Other")
)]

weather_group_profile <- as.data.table(df_phase3)[, .N, by = weather_group][order(-N)]
fwrite(weather_group_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase3_weather_group_profile.csv"))

knitr::kable(weather_group_profile, caption = "Phase 3 weather group profile")
```

```{r phase-3-wind-direction}
df_phase3[, wind_dir_norm := normalize_wind_direction(Wind_Direction)]

wind_direction_summary <- as.data.table(df_phase3)[, .N, by = wind_dir_norm][order(-N)]

if (length(levels(df_phase3$wind_dir_norm)) > 9) {
  stop("Phase 3 wind direction normalization produced too many levels.")
}

fwrite(wind_direction_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase3_wind_direction_normalized.csv"))

knitr::kable(wind_direction_summary, caption = "Phase 3 normalized wind direction profile")
```

```{r phase-3-binary-audit}
zero_variance_flags <- c("Bump", "Roundabout", "Turning_Loop", "Traffic_Calming", "No_Exit")
near_zero_flags <- c("Give_Way", "Station", "Railway", "Amenity")
retained_flags <- c("Crossing", "Junction", "Traffic_Signal", "Stop")

binary_audit <- data.table(
  flag = c(zero_variance_flags, near_zero_flags, retained_flags),
  true_count = vapply(
    df_phase3[, c(zero_variance_flags, near_zero_flags, retained_flags), with = FALSE],
    function(column) sum(as.logical(column), na.rm = TRUE),
    integer(1)
  )
)

binary_audit[, true_pct := round(100 * true_count / nrow(df_phase3), 4)]
binary_audit[, decision := c(
  rep("Exclude: zero variance", length(zero_variance_flags)),
  rep("Exclude: near-zero variance", length(near_zero_flags)),
  rep("Retain for scenario matrix", length(retained_flags))
)]

for (flag_name in retained_flags) {
  # v2.0: use native FALSE/TRUE factor levels (no string labels)
  df_phase3[, (flag_name) := factor(
    as.logical(get(flag_name)),
    levels = c(FALSE, TRUE)
  )]
}

fwrite(binary_audit, file.path(output_dir, "phase3_binary_audit.csv"))

knitr::kable(binary_audit, caption = "Phase 3 binary flag audit")
```

```{r phase-3-summary}
phase_3_summary <- data.table(
  feature_group = c(
    "Temporal features",
    "Duration treatment",
    "Weather grouping",
    "Wind normalization",
    "Binary flag audit"
  ),
  status = c(
    "Added hour, hour_band, weekday, weekend, month, season, rush_hour",
    "Added Duration_cap and log_Duration",
    "Added weather_group with 7 levels",
    "Added wind_dir_norm with at most 9 levels",
    "Marked zero and near-zero flags for exclusion; retained core road-context flags"
  )
)

fwrite(phase_3_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase3_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(phase_3_summary, caption = "Phase 3 feature engineering summary")
```

# Phase 4: Build Clustering Input Matrices

This phase constructs the final matrices that will be used by the clustering methods. Nothing outside these matrices should enter the clustering algorithms.

```{r phase-4-scenario-matrix}
df_scenario_base <- as.data.table(copy(df_phase3))

# v2.0: native FALSE/TRUE levels, no string labels
df_scenario_base[, weekend   := factor(weekend,   levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))]
df_scenario_base[, rush_hour := factor(rush_hour, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))]
df_scenario_base[, Sunrise_Sunset := factor(Sunrise_Sunset)]

scenario_factor_cols <- c(
  "hour_band", "weekday", "weekend", "season", "rush_hour",
  "Sunrise_Sunset", "weather_group", "Crossing", "Junction",
  "Traffic_Signal", "Stop"
)

scenario_numeric_cols <- c(
  "Temperature(F)", "Humidity(%)", "Pressure(in)",
  "Visibility(mi)", "Wind_Speed(mph)"
)

if (mean(is.na(df_scenario_base$log_Duration)) < 0.05) {
  scenario_numeric_cols <- c(scenario_numeric_cols, "log_Duration")
}

scenario_columns <- c(scenario_factor_cols, scenario_numeric_cols)

df_scenario <- df_scenario_base[, ..scenario_columns]

excluded_columns <- c(
  "Severity", "ID", "Source", "Description", "Street", "City", "Zipcode", "nzip",
  "Start_Lat", "Start_Lng", "End_Lat", "End_Lng", "County", "Distance(mi)",
  "Precipitation(in)", "Wind_Chill(F)", "Bump", "Roundabout", "Turning_Loop",
  "Traffic_Calming", "No_Exit", "Give_Way", "Station", "Railway", "Amenity"
)

unexpected_excluded <- intersect(names(df_scenario), excluded_columns)
if (length(unexpected_excluded) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste(
      "Excluded columns were found in df_scenario:",
      paste(unexpected_excluded, collapse = ", ")
    )
  )
}

numeric_imputation_log <- data.table(
  column = character(),
  missing_before = integer(),
  missing_pct = numeric(),
  imputation = character()
)

for (column_name in scenario_numeric_cols) {
  missing_before <- sum(is.na(df_scenario[[column_name]]))
  if (!missing_before) {
    next
  }

  missing_pct <- 100 * mean(is.na(df_scenario[[column_name]]))
  median_value <- median(df_scenario[[column_name]], na.rm = TRUE)
  df_scenario[is.na(get(column_name)), (column_name) := median_value]

  numeric_imputation_log <- rbind(
    numeric_imputation_log,
    data.table(
      column = column_name,
      missing_before = missing_before,
      missing_pct = round(missing_pct, 4),
      imputation = "Median"
    )
  )
}

factor_imputation_log <- data.table(
  column = character(),
  missing_before = integer(),
  rule_applied = character()
)

for (column_name in scenario_factor_cols) {
  missing_before <- sum(is.na(df_scenario[[column_name]]))
  if (!missing_before) {
    next
  }

  if (missing_before < 10) {
    fill_value <- mode_value(df_scenario[[column_name]])
    df_scenario[is.na(get(column_name)), (column_name) := fill_value]
    rule_applied <- "Mode"
  } else {
    df_scenario[[column_name]] <- addNA(df_scenario[[column_name]])
    levels(df_scenario[[column_name]])[is.na(levels(df_scenario[[column_name]]))] <- "Unknown"
    rule_applied <- "Unknown level"
  }

  factor_imputation_log <- rbind(
    factor_imputation_log,
    data.table(
      column = column_name,
      missing_before = missing_before,
      rule_applied = rule_applied
    )
  )
}

scenario_na_total <- sum(is.na(df_scenario))
if (scenario_na_total > 0) {
  stop("df_scenario still contains missing values after Phase 4 imputations.")
}

scenario_column_profile <- data.table(
  column = names(df_scenario),
  type = vapply(df_scenario, function(column) class(column)[1], character(1))
)

scenario_matrix_summary <- data.table(
  metric = c("Rows", "Columns", "Factor columns", "Numeric columns", "Total NAs"),
  value = c(
    nrow(df_scenario),
    ncol(df_scenario),
    length(scenario_factor_cols),
    length(scenario_numeric_cols),
    scenario_na_total
  )
)

fwrite(scenario_column_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase4_scenario_columns.csv"))
fwrite(numeric_imputation_log, file.path(output_dir, "phase4_numeric_imputation_log.csv"))
fwrite(factor_imputation_log, file.path(output_dir, "phase4_factor_imputation_log.csv"))
fwrite(scenario_matrix_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase4_scenario_matrix_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(scenario_matrix_summary, caption = "Phase 4 scenario matrix summary")
knitr::kable(scenario_column_profile, caption = "Phase 4 scenario column list")
```

```{r phase-4-spatial-matrix}
if (any(is.na(df_phase3$Start_Lat)) || any(is.na(df_phase3$Start_Lng))) {
  stop("Start_Lat or Start_Lng contains missing values, so df_spatial cannot be built.")
}

lat0 <- 40.8
lng0 <- -73.2

df_spatial <- data.table(
  x_km = (df_phase3$Start_Lng - lng0) * 111.32 * cos(lat0 * pi / 180),
  y_km = (df_phase3$Start_Lat - lat0) * 110.574
)

spatial_extent <- data.table(
  metric = c("Rows", "Columns", "x_km min", "x_km max", "x_km span", "y_km min", "y_km max", "y_km span"),
  value = c(
    nrow(df_spatial),
    ncol(df_spatial),
    min(df_spatial$x_km),
    max(df_spatial$x_km),
    diff(range(df_spatial$x_km)),
    min(df_spatial$y_km),
    max(df_spatial$y_km),
    diff(range(df_spatial$y_km))
  )
)

if (sum(is.na(df_spatial)) > 0) {
  stop("df_spatial contains missing values after coordinate projection.")
}

fwrite(spatial_extent, file.path(output_dir, "phase4_spatial_extent.csv"))

knitr::kable(spatial_extent, caption = "Phase 4 spatial matrix extent")
```

```{r phase-4-summary}
phase_4_summary <- data.table(
  matrix = c("df_scenario", "df_spatial"),
  rows = c(nrow(df_scenario), nrow(df_spatial)),
  columns = c(ncol(df_scenario), ncol(df_spatial)),
  na_count = c(sum(is.na(df_scenario)), sum(is.na(df_spatial)))
)

fwrite(phase_4_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase4_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(phase_4_summary, caption = "Phase 4 matrix readiness summary")
```

```{r phase-4-reduced-scenario-matrix}
# v2.0: Reduced feature matrix for sensitivity analysis.
# Drops Pressure(in) and Visibility(mi) — both required median imputation.
# Used in Phase 5 and Phase 6 to test whether removing imputed features
# improves silhouette and Jaccard scores.

reduced_numeric_cols <- setdiff(
  scenario_numeric_cols,
  c("Pressure(in)", "Visibility(mi)")
)

df_scenario_reduced <- df_scenario[
  , c(scenario_factor_cols, reduced_numeric_cols), with = FALSE
]

stopifnot(sum(is.na(df_scenario_reduced)) == 0)
stopifnot(
  ncol(df_scenario_reduced) ==
    length(scenario_factor_cols) + length(reduced_numeric_cols)
)

reduced_matrix_summary <- data.table(
  item = c(
    "Rows",
    "Factor columns",
    "Numeric columns",
    "Dropped from full matrix"
  ),
  value = c(
    nrow(df_scenario_reduced),
    length(scenario_factor_cols),
    length(reduced_numeric_cols),
    paste(c("Pressure(in)", "Visibility(mi)"), collapse = ", ")
  )
)

fwrite(
  reduced_matrix_summary,
  file.path(output_dir, "phase4_reduced_matrix_summary.csv")
)

knitr::kable(
  reduced_matrix_summary,
  caption = "Phase 4 reduced scenario matrix (dropped imputed features)"
)
```

# Phase 5: k-Prototypes Scenario Clustering

This phase runs the candidate mixed-type clustering solutions on `df_scenario` and stores the diagnostics needed for later model selection.

```{r phase-5-type-check}
scenario_type_check <- data.table(
  column = names(df_scenario),
  class = vapply(df_scenario, function(column) class(column)[1], character(1))
)

factor_check <- scenario_type_check[column %in% scenario_factor_cols]
numeric_check <- scenario_type_check[column %in% scenario_numeric_cols]

if (!all(vapply(df_scenario[, ..scenario_factor_cols], is.factor, logical(1)))) {
  stop("One or more Phase 5 scenario factor columns are not stored as factors.")
}

if (!all(vapply(df_scenario[, ..scenario_numeric_cols], is.numeric, logical(1)))) {
  stop("One or more Phase 5 scenario numeric columns are not stored as numeric values.")
}

fwrite(scenario_type_check, file.path(output_dir, "phase5_scenario_type_check.csv"))

knitr::kable(scenario_type_check, caption = "Phase 5 scenario type check")
```

```{r phase-5-kproto-candidates}
candidate_k <- 3:8
kp_results <- list()

for (k_value in candidate_k) {
  set.seed(42)
  kp_results[[as.character(k_value)]] <- clustMixType::kproto(
    x = df_scenario,
    k = k_value,
    lambda = NULL,
    nstart = 10,
    type = "gower",
    keep.data = TRUE,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
}
```

```{r phase-5-cluster-summaries}
cluster_fit_summary <- rbindlist(
  lapply(names(kp_results), function(k_label) {
    model_fit <- kp_results[[k_label]]
    cluster_sizes <- table(model_fit$cluster)

    data.table(
      k = as.integer(k_label),
      tot_withinss = model_fit$tot.withinss,
      lambda = if (is.null(model_fit$lambda)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(model_fit$lambda)[1],
      min_cluster_size = min(cluster_sizes),
      max_cluster_size = max(cluster_sizes),
      n_clusters = length(cluster_sizes),
      potentially_unstable = min(cluster_sizes) < 200
    )
  })
)

# v2.0: Add approximate numeric R² (variance explained) to fit summary.
# Note: tot.withinss in kproto includes both numeric and categorical
# components. This R² is computed on the numeric columns only and should
# be labelled "approximate" in any report table.
total_ss_numeric <- sum(
  sapply(scenario_numeric_cols, function(col) {
    x <- df_scenario[[col]]
    sum((x - mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))^2, na.rm = TRUE)
  })
)

cluster_fit_summary[, variance_explained_pct := round(
  100 * (1 - tot_withinss / total_ss_numeric), 2
)]

cluster_size_table <- rbindlist(
  lapply(names(kp_results), function(k_label) {
    model_fit <- kp_results[[k_label]]
    data.table(
      k = as.integer(k_label),
      cluster = names(table(model_fit$cluster)),
      size = as.integer(table(model_fit$cluster))
    )
  })
)

dominance_checks <- rbindlist(
  lapply(names(kp_results), function(k_label) {
    model_fit <- kp_results[[k_label]]
    clustered_data <- copy(df_scenario)
    clustered_data[, cluster := factor(model_fit$cluster)]

    rbindlist(lapply(scenario_factor_cols, function(column_name) {
      clustered_data[, .(
        dominant_share = round(dominant_share(get(column_name)), 4)
      ), by = cluster][
        , `:=`(
          k = as.integer(k_label),
          feature = column_name
        )
      ]
    }), fill = TRUE)
  }),
  fill = TRUE
)

dominance_flags <- dominance_checks[
  dominant_share >= 0.9
][order(k, cluster, feature)]

fwrite(cluster_fit_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase5_kproto_fit_summary.csv"))
fwrite(cluster_size_table, file.path(output_dir, "phase5_kproto_cluster_sizes.csv"))
fwrite(dominance_checks, file.path(output_dir, "phase5_kproto_dominance_checks.csv"))
fwrite(dominance_flags, file.path(output_dir, "phase5_kproto_dominance_flags.csv"))

knitr::kable(cluster_fit_summary, caption = "Phase 5 k-prototypes fit summary")
knitr::kable(cluster_size_table, caption = "Phase 5 cluster sizes by k")
```

```{r phase-5-elbow-plot, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=7}
elbow_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  cluster_fit_summary,
  ggplot2::aes(x = k, y = tot_withinss)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#1f78b4", linewidth = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(color = "#1f78b4", size = 2.4) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    ggplot2::aes(label = k),
    nudge_y = max(cluster_fit_summary$tot_withinss) * 0.01,
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Phase 5 Elbow Plot",
    x = "Number of clusters (k)",
    y = "Total within-cluster distance"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()

print(elbow_plot)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "phase5_kproto_elbow_plot.png"),
  plot = elbow_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r phase-5-summary}
phase_5_summary <- data.table(
  checkpoint = c(
    "Candidate solutions created",
    "k range covered",
    "Elbow plot saved",
    "Cluster sizes recorded",
    "Dominance checks recorded"
  ),
  status = c(
    length(kp_results) == 6,
    paste(candidate_k, collapse = ", "),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase5_kproto_elbow_plot.png")),
    nrow(cluster_size_table) > 0,
    nrow(dominance_checks) > 0
  )
)

fwrite(phase_5_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase5_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(phase_5_summary, caption = "Phase 5 readiness summary")
```

```{r phase-5-reduced-kproto}
# v2.0: Run k-prototypes on the reduced feature matrix (no Pressure/Visibility).
# Results compared against full-feature runs in Phase 6.

kp_results_reduced <- list()
for (k_val in candidate_k) {
  set.seed(42)
  kp_results_reduced[[as.character(k_val)]] <- clustMixType::kproto(
    x         = df_scenario_reduced,
    k         = k_val,
    lambda    = NULL,
    nstart    = 10,
    type      = "gower",
    keep.data = TRUE,
    verbose   = FALSE
  )
}

reduced_fit_summary <- rbindlist(
  lapply(names(kp_results_reduced), function(k_label) {
    model_fit    <- kp_results_reduced[[k_label]]
    cluster_sizes <- table(model_fit$cluster)
    data.table(
      k             = as.integer(k_label),
      tot_withinss  = model_fit$tot.withinss,
      min_cluster_size = min(cluster_sizes),
      max_cluster_size = max(cluster_sizes),
      feature_set   = "reduced"
    )
  })
)

full_fit_labeled <- copy(
  cluster_fit_summary[, .(k, tot_withinss, min_cluster_size, max_cluster_size)]
)[, feature_set := "full"]

feature_comparison_fits <- rbind(full_fit_labeled, reduced_fit_summary)
setorder(feature_comparison_fits, k, feature_set)

fwrite(
  feature_comparison_fits,
  file.path(output_dir, "phase5_feature_comparison_fits.csv")
)

knitr::kable(
  feature_comparison_fits,
  caption = "Phase 5: within-cluster distance — full vs reduced feature set"
)
```

# Phase 6: Cluster Validation and Stability

This phase uses internal validation, bootstrap stability, and cluster profile checks to choose a defensible value of `k`.

```{r phase-6-internal-validation}
validation_input <- copy(df_scenario)
validation_rows <- nrow(df_scenario)
validation_repeat_results <- NULL

if (identical(phase6_validation_mode, "consensus_sampled")) {
  validation_rows <- min(phase6_validation_sample_n, nrow(df_scenario))
  validation_repeat_results <- rbindlist(
    lapply(seq_len(phase6_validation_repeats), function(repeat_id) {
      set.seed(42 + repeat_id)
      sampled_index <- sort(sample.int(nrow(df_scenario), validation_rows))
      validation_input_repeat <- copy(df_scenario[sampled_index])

      val_repeat <- clustMixType::validation_kproto(
        method = "silhouette",
        data = validation_input_repeat,
        k = candidate_k,
        nstart = 5,
        type = "gower",
        kp_obj = "all",
        verbose = FALSE
      )

      data.table(
        repeat_id = repeat_id,
        validation_rows = validation_rows,
        repeat_k_opt = as.integer(val_repeat$k_opt),
        k = as.integer(names(val_repeat$indices)),
        silhouette = as.numeric(val_repeat$indices)
      )
    }),
    fill = TRUE
  )

  validation_optimal_counts <- unique(
    validation_repeat_results[, .(repeat_id, repeat_k_opt)]
  )[, .(optimal_repeat_count = .N), by = .(k = repeat_k_opt)]

  validation_table <- validation_repeat_results[, .(
    silhouette = mean(silhouette),
    sd_silhouette = stats::sd(silhouette),
    median_silhouette = stats::median(silhouette)
  ), by = k]

  validation_table <- merge(
    validation_table,
    validation_optimal_counts,
    by = "k",
    all.x = TRUE
  )
  validation_table[is.na(optimal_repeat_count), optimal_repeat_count := 0L]
  validation_table[, optimal_repeat_share := round(optimal_repeat_count / phase6_validation_repeats, 4)]
  validation_table <- validation_table[order(-optimal_repeat_count, -silhouette, k)]
  validation_optimal_k <- validation_table$k[1]
} else {
  if (identical(phase6_validation_mode, "sampled")) {
    set.seed(42)
    validation_rows <- min(phase6_validation_sample_n, nrow(df_scenario))
    sampled_index <- sort(sample.int(nrow(df_scenario), validation_rows))
    validation_input <- copy(df_scenario[sampled_index])
  }

  val_result <- clustMixType::validation_kproto(
    method = "silhouette",
    data = validation_input,
    k = candidate_k,
    nstart = 5,
    type = "gower",
    kp_obj = "all",
    verbose = FALSE
  )

  validation_table <- data.table(
    k = as.integer(names(val_result$indices)),
    silhouette = as.numeric(val_result$indices),
    sd_silhouette = NA_real_,
    median_silhouette = as.numeric(val_result$indices),
    optimal_repeat_count = 1L,
    optimal_repeat_share = 1
  )[order(-silhouette, k)]
  validation_optimal_k <- as.integer(val_result$k_opt)
}

validation_metadata <- data.table(
  setting = c("validation_mode", "validation_rows", "full_rows", "sample_fraction", "validation_repeats"),
  value = c(
    phase6_validation_mode,
    validation_rows,
    nrow(df_scenario),
    round(validation_rows / nrow(df_scenario), 4),
    phase6_validation_repeats
  )
)

top_two_k <- head(validation_table$k, 2)

fwrite(validation_table, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_validation_indices.csv"))
fwrite(validation_metadata, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_validation_metadata.csv"))
if (!is.null(validation_repeat_results)) {
  fwrite(validation_repeat_results, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_validation_repeats.csv"))
}

knitr::kable(validation_table, caption = "Phase 6 internal validation indices")
knitr::kable(validation_metadata, caption = "Phase 6 validation run settings")
if (!is.null(validation_repeat_results)) {
  knitr::kable(validation_repeat_results, caption = "Phase 6 validation repeat detail")
}
```

```{r phase-6-internal-validation-archived, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Archived full-data validation reference for a later high-memory rerun.
# Use this only on a machine that can handle the full pairwise distance load.
val_result_full <- clustMixType::validation_kproto(
  method = "silhouette",
  data = df_scenario,
  k = candidate_k,
  nstart = 5,
  type = "gower",
  kp_obj = "all",
  verbose = FALSE
)
```

```{r phase-6-stability}
stability_input <- copy(df_scenario)
stability_rows <- nrow(df_scenario)
stability_models <- kp_results[as.character(top_two_k)]
stability_repeat_results <- NULL
stability_bootstrap <- data.table()

if (identical(phase6_stability_mode, "consensus_sampled")) {
  stability_rows <- min(phase6_stability_sample_n, nrow(df_scenario))

  consensus_stability_outputs <- lapply(seq_len(phase6_stability_repeats), function(repeat_id) {
      set.seed(420 + repeat_id)
      stability_index <- sort(sample.int(nrow(df_scenario), stability_rows))
      stability_input_repeat <- copy(df_scenario[stability_index])

      repeat_models <- lapply(top_two_k, function(k_value) {
        set.seed(420 + repeat_id)
        clustMixType::kproto(
          x = stability_input_repeat,
          k = k_value,
          lambda = NULL,
          nstart = 5,
          type = "gower",
          keep.data = TRUE,
          verbose = FALSE
        )
      })
      names(repeat_models) <- as.character(top_two_k)

      repeat_stability_outputs <- lapply(top_two_k, function(k_value) {
        stab <- clustMixType::stability_kproto(
          object = repeat_models[[as.character(k_value)]],
          method = c("rand", "jaccard"),
          B = phase6_stability_bootstraps,
          verbose = FALSE,
          nstart = 5
        )

        bootstrap_dt <- as.data.table(stab[[2]])
        bootstrap_dt[, `:=`(k = k_value, repeat_id = repeat_id)]

        list(
          summary_dt = data.table(
            repeat_id = repeat_id,
            k = k_value,
            rand = as.numeric(stab[[1]]["R"]),
            jaccard = as.numeric(stab[[1]]["J"])
          ),
          bootstrap_dt = bootstrap_dt
        )
      })

      list(
        summary_dt = rbindlist(lapply(repeat_stability_outputs, `[[`, "summary_dt"), fill = TRUE),
        bootstrap_dt = rbindlist(lapply(repeat_stability_outputs, `[[`, "bootstrap_dt"), fill = TRUE)
      )
    })

  stability_repeat_results <- rbindlist(
    lapply(consensus_stability_outputs, `[[`, "summary_dt"),
    fill = TRUE
  )
  stability_bootstrap <- rbindlist(
    lapply(consensus_stability_outputs, `[[`, "bootstrap_dt"),
    fill = TRUE
  )

  stability_summary <- stability_repeat_results[, .(
    rand = mean(rand),
    jaccard = mean(jaccard),
    sd_rand = stats::sd(rand),
    sd_jaccard = stats::sd(jaccard),
    stability_repeats = .N,
    stable_repeat_share = round(mean(jaccard >= 0.6), 4),
    strong_repeat_share = round(mean(jaccard >= 0.75), 4),
    stable_jaccard = mean(jaccard >= 0.6) >= 0.5,
    strong_jaccard = mean(jaccard >= 0.75) >= 0.5
  ), by = k][order(-jaccard, -rand, k)]
} else {
  if (identical(phase6_stability_mode, "sampled")) {
    set.seed(42)
    stability_rows <- min(phase6_stability_sample_n, nrow(df_scenario))
    stability_index <- sort(sample.int(nrow(df_scenario), stability_rows))
    stability_input <- copy(df_scenario[stability_index])

    stability_models <- lapply(top_two_k, function(k_value) {
      set.seed(42)
      clustMixType::kproto(
        x = stability_input,
        k = k_value,
        lambda = NULL,
        nstart = 5,
        type = "gower",
        keep.data = TRUE,
        verbose = FALSE
      )
    })
    names(stability_models) <- as.character(top_two_k)
  }

  stability_results <- lapply(top_two_k, function(k_value) {
    set.seed(42)
    stab <- clustMixType::stability_kproto(
      object = stability_models[[as.character(k_value)]],
      method = c("rand", "jaccard"),
      B = phase6_stability_bootstraps,
      verbose = FALSE,
      nstart = 5
    )

    list(
      k = k_value,
      summary = stab[[1]],
      bootstrap = as.data.table(stab[[2]])
    )
  })

  stability_summary <- rbindlist(
    lapply(stability_results, function(result) {
      data.table(
        k = result$k,
        rand = as.numeric(result$summary["R"]),
        jaccard = as.numeric(result$summary["J"]),
        sd_rand = NA_real_,
        sd_jaccard = NA_real_,
        stability_repeats = 1L,
        stable_repeat_share = as.numeric(result$summary["J"]) >= 0.6,
        strong_repeat_share = as.numeric(result$summary["J"]) >= 0.75,
        stable_jaccard = as.numeric(result$summary["J"]) >= 0.6,
        strong_jaccard = as.numeric(result$summary["J"]) >= 0.75
      )
    })
  )[order(-jaccard, -rand, k)]

  stability_bootstrap <- rbindlist(
    lapply(stability_results, function(result) {
      bootstrap_dt <- copy(result$bootstrap)
      bootstrap_dt[, `:=`(k = result$k, repeat_id = 1L)]
      bootstrap_dt
    }),
    fill = TRUE
  )
}

stability_metadata <- data.table(
  setting = c("stability_mode", "stability_rows", "full_rows", "sample_fraction", "bootstrap_reps", "stability_repeats"),
  value = c(
    phase6_stability_mode,
    stability_rows,
    nrow(df_scenario),
    round(stability_rows / nrow(df_scenario), 4),
    phase6_stability_bootstraps,
    phase6_stability_repeats
  )
)

fwrite(stability_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_stability_summary.csv"))
fwrite(stability_bootstrap, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_stability_bootstrap.csv"))
fwrite(stability_metadata, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_stability_metadata.csv"))
if (!is.null(stability_repeat_results)) {
  fwrite(stability_repeat_results, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_stability_repeats.csv"))
}

knitr::kable(stability_summary, caption = "Phase 6 stability summary")
knitr::kable(stability_metadata, caption = "Phase 6 stability run settings")
if (!is.null(stability_repeat_results)) {
  knitr::kable(stability_repeat_results, caption = "Phase 6 stability repeat detail")
}
```

```{r phase-6-jaccard-ci}
# v2.0: Compute Jaccard mean, SD, and range across bootstrap repeats.
# Under consensus_16gb (3 repeats) this gives a variance estimate.
# Under local_safe (1 repeat) this falls back gracefully.
if (!is.null(stability_repeat_results) &&
    nrow(stability_repeat_results) > 0 &&
    "jaccard" %in% names(stability_repeat_results)) {

  jaccard_ci <- stability_repeat_results[, .(
    jaccard_mean = round(mean(jaccard, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    jaccard_sd   = round(sd(jaccard,   na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    jaccard_min  = round(min(jaccard,  na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    jaccard_max  = round(max(jaccard,  na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    n_repeats    = .N
  ), by = k]

  fwrite(jaccard_ci, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_jaccard_ci.csv"))
  knitr::kable(
    jaccard_ci,
    caption = "Phase 6 Jaccard stability with variance across bootstrap repeats"
  )
} else {
  cat("Single bootstrap repeat --- Jaccard CI not available under local_safe.\n")
}
```

```{r phase-6-stability-archived, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Archived full-data stability reference for a later high-memory rerun.
stability_results_full <- lapply(top_two_k, function(k_value) {
  set.seed(42)
  clustMixType::stability_kproto(
    object = kp_results[[as.character(k_value)]],
    method = c("rand", "jaccard"),
    B = 50,
    verbose = FALSE,
    nstart = 5
  )
})
```

```{r phase-6-select-k}
# v2.0: Verbose k-selection with explicit diagnostics.
# The original silent fallback could select a k without any trace of
# which conditions fired or whether NA extraction caused a bypass.

validation_optimal_k_raw <- validation_table$k[1]
silhouette_at_optimal    <- validation_table$silhouette[1]

cat("=== Phase 6 k-Selection Diagnostics ===\n")
cat("Silhouette-optimal k        :", validation_optimal_k_raw, "\n")
cat("Silhouette at optimal k     :", round(silhouette_at_optimal, 4), "\n")
cat("Silhouette threshold (0.30) :",
    ifelse(silhouette_at_optimal >= 0.30, "MET", "NOT MET"), "\n\n")
cat("Stability available for k   :",
    paste(stability_summary$k, collapse = ", "), "\n")

selected_stability <- stability_summary[
  k == validation_optimal_k_raw, jaccard
]

cat("Jaccard at silhouette-optimal k :",
    ifelse(length(selected_stability) == 1 && !is.na(selected_stability),
           round(selected_stability, 4), "NOT FOUND / NA"), "\n")
cat("Jaccard threshold (0.40)        :",
    ifelse(length(selected_stability) == 1 &&
             !is.na(selected_stability) &&
             selected_stability >= 0.40, "MET", "NOT MET"), "\n\n")

fallback_triggered <- FALSE
if (length(selected_stability) == 1 &&
    !is.na(selected_stability) &&
    selected_stability < 0.5 &&
    nrow(stability_summary) > 1) {

  alt_k       <- stability_summary[order(-jaccard, -rand, k)][1, k]
  alt_jaccard <- stability_summary[order(-jaccard, -rand, k)][1, jaccard]

  cat("Fallback condition met. Stability-optimal k:", alt_k,
      "| Jaccard:", round(alt_jaccard, 4), "\n")

  if (!is.na(alt_jaccard) && alt_jaccard > selected_stability) {
    selected_k         <- alt_k
    fallback_triggered <- TRUE
    cat("Fallback ACTIVATED: selected_k changed to", selected_k, "\n\n")
  } else {
    selected_k <- validation_optimal_k_raw
    cat("Fallback NOT activated: no better Jaccard available.",
        "Retaining k =", selected_k, "\n\n")
  }
} else {
  selected_k <- validation_optimal_k_raw
  cat("Fallback condition not met. Using silhouette-optimal k =",
      selected_k, "\n\n")
}
cat("FINAL selected_k :", selected_k, "\n")
cat("========================================\n")

selected_model <- kp_results[[as.character(selected_k)]]
selected_jaccard <- if (selected_k %in% stability_summary$k) {
  stability_summary[k == selected_k, round(jaccard, 4)]
} else {
  NA_real_
}

# v2.0: Explicit quality gate — fires a warning and builds a status table
# whenever silhouette or Jaccard fall below published thresholds.
selected_silhouette <- validation_table[k == selected_k, silhouette]
selected_jaccard_v2 <- if (selected_k %in% stability_summary$k) {
  stability_summary[k == selected_k, jaccard]
} else {
  NA_real_
}

sil_pass     <- !is.na(selected_silhouette) && selected_silhouette >= 0.30
jaccard_pass <- !is.na(selected_jaccard_v2) && selected_jaccard_v2 >= 0.40

quality_gate <- data.table(
  metric = c("Silhouette width", "Jaccard stability"),
  observed = c(
    round(selected_silhouette, 4),
    round(selected_jaccard_v2, 4)
  ),
  threshold = c(0.30, 0.40),
  pass = c(sil_pass, jaccard_pass),
  interpretation = c(
    ifelse(sil_pass,
           "Acceptable cluster separation",
           "Weak separation — exploratory only"),
    ifelse(jaccard_pass,
           "Acceptable bootstrap stability",
           "Poor stability — exploratory only")
  )
)

fwrite(quality_gate, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_quality_gate.csv"))
knitr::kable(quality_gate, caption = "Phase 6 cluster quality gate (v2.0)")

if (!sil_pass || !jaccard_pass) {
  warning(paste0(
    "\n\n*** CLUSTER QUALITY WARNING (v2.0) ***\n",
    "  Silhouette = ", round(selected_silhouette, 4),
    " (threshold >= 0.30): ", ifelse(sil_pass, "PASS", "FAIL"), "\n",
    "  Jaccard    = ", round(selected_jaccard_v2, 4),
    " (threshold >= 0.40): ", ifelse(jaccard_pass, "PASS", "FAIL"), "\n",
    "  selected_k = ", selected_k,
    " solution is EXPLORATORY.\n",
    "  Do not present clusters as stable accident archetypes.\n",
    "***********************************************\n"
  ))
}

selection_summary <- data.table(
  metric = c(
    "Validation method",
    "Validation mode",
    "Validation rows",
    "Stability mode",
    "Stability rows",
    "Stability bootstraps",
    "Validation-optimal k",
    "Top two k values for stability",
    "Selected k",
    "Selected k Jaccard"
  ),
  value = c(
    "silhouette",
    phase6_validation_mode,
    validation_rows,
    phase6_stability_mode,
    stability_rows,
    phase6_stability_bootstraps,
    validation_optimal_k,
    paste(top_two_k, collapse = ", "),
    selected_k,
    selected_jaccard
  )
)

fwrite(selection_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_selection_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(selection_summary, caption = "Phase 6 k-selection summary")
```

```{r phase-6-reduced-validation}
# v2.0: Validate reduced-feature k-prototypes candidates.
# Compares silhouette scores with and without Pressure(in)/Visibility(mi).
# v2.0: Mirror the same sampling strategy used in the main Phase 6 validation
# to stay within memory limits. Uses phase6_validation_sample_n rows.
set.seed(42)
reduced_val_rows <- min(phase6_validation_sample_n, nrow(df_scenario_reduced))
reduced_val_input <- if (identical(phase6_validation_mode, "full")) {
  copy(df_scenario_reduced)
} else {
  reduced_sampled_idx <- sort(sample.int(nrow(df_scenario_reduced), reduced_val_rows))
  copy(df_scenario_reduced[reduced_sampled_idx])
}

cat("Reduced-feature validation sample size:", nrow(reduced_val_input), "\n")

validation_reduced_raw <- clustMixType::validation_kproto(
  method  = "silhouette",
  data    = reduced_val_input,
  k       = candidate_k,
  nstart  = 5,
  type    = "gower",
  kp_obj  = "all",
  verbose = FALSE
)

validation_reduced_table <- data.table(
  k          = as.integer(names(validation_reduced_raw$indices)),
  silhouette = as.numeric(validation_reduced_raw$indices)
)
validation_reduced_table[, feature_set := "reduced"]

validation_full_labeled <- copy(
  validation_table[, .(k, silhouette)]
)[, feature_set := "full"]

feature_silhouette_comparison <- rbind(
  validation_full_labeled,
  validation_reduced_table[, .(k, silhouette, feature_set)]
)
setorder(feature_silhouette_comparison, k, feature_set)

fwrite(
  feature_silhouette_comparison,
  file.path(output_dir, "phase6_feature_silhouette_comparison.csv")
)

knitr::kable(
  feature_silhouette_comparison,
  caption = "Phase 6 silhouette: full vs reduced feature set"
)
```

```{r phase-6-cluster-profiles}
profile_plot_path <- file.path(output_dir, "phase6_cluster_profiles.pdf")
grDevices::pdf(profile_plot_path, width = 12, height = 8)
clustMixType::clprofiles(selected_model, df_scenario)
grDevices::dev.off()

selected_cluster_data <- copy(df_scenario)
selected_cluster_data[, cluster := factor(selected_model$cluster)]

cluster_profile_summary <- selected_cluster_data[, .(
  dominant_hour_band = mode_value(hour_band),
  dominant_weather_group = mode_value(weather_group),
  dominant_weekend = mode_value(weekend),
  dominant_sunrise_sunset = mode_value(Sunrise_Sunset),
  dominant_junction = mode_value(Junction),
  dominant_traffic_signal = mode_value(Traffic_Signal),
  mean_temperature = round(mean(`Temperature(F)`), 2),
  mean_visibility = round(mean(`Visibility(mi)`), 2),
  mean_log_duration = round(mean(log_Duration), 3)
), by = cluster]

cluster_profile_summary[, working_name := dplyr::case_when(
  dominant_weather_group == "Snow_Ice" ~ "Winter Adverse",
  dominant_sunrise_sunset == "Night" & dominant_weather_group %in% c("Fog_Haze", "Rain", "Thunderstorm") ~ "Night Low-Visibility",
  dominant_weekend == "TRUE" & dominant_traffic_signal == "TRUE" ~ "Weekend Surface Road",
  dominant_hour_band %in% c("AM_Rush", "PM_Rush") & dominant_junction == "TRUE" ~ "Rush Corridor",
  TRUE ~ paste("Scenario Cluster", cluster)
)]

fwrite(cluster_profile_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_cluster_profile_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(cluster_profile_summary, caption = "Phase 6 cluster profile summary")
```

```{r phase-6-summary}
phase_6_summary <- data.table(
  checkpoint = c(
    "Validation indices saved",
    "Validation metadata saved",
    "Stability summary saved",
    "Stability metadata saved",
    "Selected k assigned",
    "Cluster profile PDF saved",
    "Working names assigned"
  ),
  status = c(
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase6_validation_indices.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase6_validation_metadata.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase6_stability_summary.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase6_stability_metadata.csv")),
    !is.null(selected_model),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase6_cluster_profiles.pdf")),
    all(nzchar(cluster_profile_summary$working_name))
  )
)

fwrite(phase_6_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase6_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(phase_6_summary, caption = "Phase 6 readiness summary")
```

# Phase 7: DBSCAN Spatial Hotspot Clustering

This phase clusters the projected Long Island coordinates with DBSCAN so the workflow can identify corridor-style hotspot zones.

```{r phase-7-parameter-selection}
knn_k <- 5L
dbscan_minpts_grid <- if (run_profile == "full_srs") c(15L, 25L, 40L, 50L, 75L, 100L) else c(40L, 50L, 75L, 100L)
dbscan_eps_grid <- seq(0.3, 2.0, by = 0.1)

knn_dist <- dbscan::kNNdist(df_spatial, k = knn_k)
knn_sorted <- sort(knn_dist)
phase7_total_rows <- nrow(df_spatial)
phase7_target_cluster_n <- 8L
phase7_target_noise_pct <- 17.5
phase7_max_cluster_share_cap <- 60

knn_profile <- data.table(
  quantile = c("50%", "75%", "90%", "95%", "97.5%", "99%"),
  value_km = round(as.numeric(quantile(knn_dist, probs = c(0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.975, 0.99))), 4)
)

eps_trials <- rbindlist(
  lapply(dbscan_minpts_grid, function(minPts_value) {
    rbindlist(lapply(dbscan_eps_grid, function(eps_value) {
      db_trial <- dbscan::dbscan(df_spatial, eps = eps_value, minPts = minPts_value)
      cluster_counts <- table(db_trial$cluster)
      non_noise_sizes <- cluster_counts[names(cluster_counts) != "0"]
      non_noise_clusters <- sum(as.integer(names(cluster_counts)) > 0)
      noise_pct <- round(100 * mean(db_trial$cluster == 0), 2)

      data.table(
        eps = round(eps_value, 2),
        minPts = minPts_value,
        non_noise_clusters = non_noise_clusters,
        noise_pct = noise_pct,
        max_cluster_size = if (length(non_noise_sizes)) max(as.integer(non_noise_sizes)) else 0L,
        max_cluster_share_pct = if (length(non_noise_sizes)) round(100 * max(as.integer(non_noise_sizes)) / phase7_total_rows, 2) else 0,
        size_balance_ok = if (length(non_noise_sizes)) round(100 * max(as.integer(non_noise_sizes)) / phase7_total_rows, 2) <= phase7_max_cluster_share_cap else FALSE,
        acceptable = non_noise_clusters >= 3 & non_noise_clusters <= 15 & noise_pct >= 5 & noise_pct <= 30 &
          if (length(non_noise_sizes)) round(100 * max(as.integer(non_noise_sizes)) / phase7_total_rows, 2) <= phase7_max_cluster_share_cap else FALSE
      )
    }))
  }),
  fill = TRUE
)

acceptable_trials <- eps_trials[acceptable == TRUE]

if (nrow(acceptable_trials) > 0) {
  selected_trial <- acceptable_trials[
    order(abs(non_noise_clusters - phase7_target_cluster_n), abs(noise_pct - phase7_target_noise_pct), max_cluster_share_pct, -minPts, eps)
  ][1]
  selection_reason <- "Accepted trial balancing cluster count, noise level, and hotspot size concentration"
} else {
  selected_trial <- eps_trials[
    order(abs(non_noise_clusters - phase7_target_cluster_n), abs(noise_pct - phase7_target_noise_pct), max_cluster_share_pct, -minPts, eps)
  ][1]
  selection_reason <- "Fallback trial closest to balanced cluster count, noise level, and hotspot size concentration"
}

eps_chosen <- selected_trial$eps[[1]]
minPts_chosen <- selected_trial$minPts[[1]]

parameter_summary <- data.table(
  metric = c(
    "kNN distance k",
    "DBSCAN minPts grid",
    "DBSCAN eps grid",
    "Largest cluster share cap (%)",
    "DBSCAN minPts",
    "Chosen eps (km)",
    "Chosen non-noise clusters",
    "Chosen noise pct",
    "Chosen largest cluster share pct",
    "Selection reason"
  ),
  value = c(
    knn_k,
    paste(dbscan_minpts_grid, collapse = ", "),
    paste(range(dbscan_eps_grid), collapse = " to "),
    phase7_max_cluster_share_cap,
    minPts_chosen,
    eps_chosen,
    selected_trial$non_noise_clusters[[1]],
    selected_trial$noise_pct[[1]],
    selected_trial$max_cluster_share_pct[[1]],
    selection_reason
  )
)

fwrite(knn_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase7_knn_profile.csv"))
fwrite(eps_trials, file.path(output_dir, "phase7_eps_trials.csv"))
fwrite(parameter_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase7_parameter_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(knn_profile, caption = "Phase 7 kNN distance profile")
knitr::kable(eps_trials, caption = "Phase 7 DBSCAN eps trials")
knitr::kable(parameter_summary, caption = "Phase 7 selected DBSCAN settings")
```

```{r phase-7-knn-plot, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=7}
knn_plot_data <- data.table(
  point_order = seq_along(knn_sorted),
  distance_km = knn_sorted
)

knn_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  knn_plot_data,
  ggplot2::aes(x = point_order, y = distance_km)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#1f78b4", linewidth = 0.6) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = eps_chosen, linetype = "dashed", color = "#e31a1c") +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Phase 7 kNN Distance Plot",
    x = "Points sorted by 5-NN distance",
    y = "5-NN distance (km)"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()

print(knn_plot)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "phase7_knn_distance_plot.png"),
  plot = knn_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r phase-7-dbscan-run}
db_result <- dbscan::dbscan(df_spatial, eps = eps_chosen, minPts = minPts_chosen)

df_spatial_clusters <- copy(df_spatial)
df_spatial_clusters[, spatial_cluster := as.integer(db_result$cluster)]

spatial_cluster_sizes <- df_spatial_clusters[, .N, by = spatial_cluster][order(spatial_cluster)]
largest_non_noise_size <- max(spatial_cluster_sizes[spatial_cluster > 0, N], na.rm = TRUE)
largest_non_noise_share_pct <- round(100 * largest_non_noise_size / nrow(df_spatial_clusters), 2)
solution_summary <- data.table(
  metric = c(
    "Rows clustered",
    "Noise pct",
    "Non-noise clusters",
    "Largest cluster size",
    "Largest cluster share pct",
    "Meets SRS cluster-count target",
    "Meets SRS noise target",
    "Meets hotspot-balance target"
  ),
  value = c(
    nrow(df_spatial_clusters),
    round(100 * mean(df_spatial_clusters$spatial_cluster == 0), 2),
    uniqueN(df_spatial_clusters$spatial_cluster[df_spatial_clusters$spatial_cluster > 0]),
    largest_non_noise_size,
    largest_non_noise_share_pct,
    uniqueN(df_spatial_clusters$spatial_cluster[df_spatial_clusters$spatial_cluster > 0]) >= 3 &
      uniqueN(df_spatial_clusters$spatial_cluster[df_spatial_clusters$spatial_cluster > 0]) <= 15,
    round(100 * mean(df_spatial_clusters$spatial_cluster == 0), 2) >= 5 &
      round(100 * mean(df_spatial_clusters$spatial_cluster == 0), 2) <= 30,
    largest_non_noise_share_pct <= phase7_max_cluster_share_cap
  )
)

if (!any(df_spatial_clusters$spatial_cluster > 0)) {
  stop("Phase 7 DBSCAN produced only noise points; adjust eps or minPts.")
}

fwrite(spatial_cluster_sizes, file.path(output_dir, "phase7_dbscan_cluster_sizes.csv"))
fwrite(solution_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase7_solution_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(spatial_cluster_sizes, caption = "Phase 7 spatial cluster sizes")
knitr::kable(solution_summary, caption = "Phase 7 DBSCAN solution summary")
```

```{r phase-7-cluster-centroids}
# v2.0: Compute centroid lat/lng for each non-noise spatial cluster.
# Export so corridor assignments can be manually verified against a map.
# Reference point: lat0 = 40.8 N, lng0 = -73.2 W (same as projection).
cluster_centroids <- df_spatial_clusters[spatial_cluster > 0, .(
  centroid_x_km = round(mean(x_km), 4),
  centroid_y_km = round(mean(y_km), 4),
  centroid_lat  = round(
    40.8 + mean(y_km) / 110.574, 5
  ),
  centroid_lng  = round(
    -73.2 + mean(x_km) / (111.32 * cos(40.8 * pi / 180)), 5
  ),
  n_accidents = .N
), by = spatial_cluster]

setorder(cluster_centroids, spatial_cluster)

fwrite(
  cluster_centroids,
  file.path(output_dir, "phase7_cluster_centroids.csv")
)

knitr::kable(
  cluster_centroids,
  caption = paste(
    "Phase 7 spatial cluster centroids (v2.0).",
    "Verify each centroid against the named corridor.",
    "lat0 = 40.8 N, lng0 = 73.2 W."
  )
)
```

```{r phase-7-eps-sensitivity}
# v2.0: Test eps sensitivity at selected +/- 0.1 km.
# Confirms the 12-cluster solution is not highly sensitive to eps.
eps_test_values <- c(
  eps_chosen - 0.1,
  eps_chosen,
  eps_chosen + 0.1
)

eps_sensitivity_table <- rbindlist(lapply(eps_test_values, function(eps_test) {
  res <- dbscan::dbscan(
    df_spatial[, .(x_km, y_km)],
    eps    = eps_test,
    minPts = minPts_chosen
  )
  n_clusters <- length(unique(res$cluster[res$cluster > 0]))
  noise_pct  <- round(100 * mean(res$cluster == 0), 2)
  max_share  <- if (sum(res$cluster > 0) > 0) {
    round(100 * max(table(res$cluster[res$cluster > 0])) /
            sum(res$cluster > 0), 2)
  } else NA_real_

  data.table(
    eps                   = eps_test,
    n_clusters            = n_clusters,
    noise_pct             = noise_pct,
    max_cluster_share_pct = max_share,
    within_srs_targets    = (
      n_clusters >= 3 & n_clusters <= 15 &
      noise_pct  >= 5 & noise_pct  <= 30 &
      max_share  <= 60
    )
  )
}))

fwrite(
  eps_sensitivity_table,
  file.path(output_dir, "phase7_eps_sensitivity.csv")
)

knitr::kable(
  eps_sensitivity_table,
  caption = "Phase 7 DBSCAN eps sensitivity (+/- 0.1 km from selected eps)"
)
```

```{r phase-7-corridor-assignment}
lat0 <- 40.8
lng0 <- -73.2

non_noise_assignments <- df_spatial_clusters[spatial_cluster > 0, .(
  cluster_size = .N,
  centroid_x_km = mean(x_km),
  centroid_y_km = mean(y_km),
  x_span_km = diff(range(x_km)),
  y_span_km = diff(range(y_km))
), by = spatial_cluster][
  , `:=`(
    centroid_lat = round((centroid_y_km / 110.574) + lat0, 5),
    centroid_lng = round((centroid_x_km / (111.32 * cos(lat0 * pi / 180))) + lng0, 5),
    shape_hint = fifelse(x_span_km >= y_span_km, "east_west", "north_south")
  )
]

non_noise_assignments[, corridor_label := dplyr::case_when(
  centroid_lat >= 40.74 & centroid_lat <= 40.76 ~ "Long Island Expressway (I-495)",
  centroid_lat >= 40.68 & centroid_lat <= 40.72 ~ "Southern State Parkway",
  centroid_lat >= 40.78 & centroid_lat <= 40.82 ~ "Northern State Parkway",
  centroid_lat >= 40.64 & centroid_lat <= 40.68 ~ "Sunrise Highway",
  centroid_lat >= 40.72 & centroid_lat <= 40.76 & shape_hint == "north_south" ~ "Meadowbrook / Wantagh Pkwy",
  TRUE ~ "Surface Road Cluster"
)]

fwrite(non_noise_assignments, file.path(output_dir, "phase7_corridor_assignments.csv"))

knitr::kable(non_noise_assignments, caption = "Phase 7 corridor assignment summary")
```

```{r phase-7-spatial-map, fig.height=5.5, fig.width=8}
df_spatial_plot <- copy(df_spatial_clusters)
df_spatial_plot[, cluster_label := factor(spatial_cluster)]

cluster_levels <- sort(unique(df_spatial_plot$cluster_label))
non_noise_levels <- setdiff(as.character(cluster_levels), "0")
cluster_colors <- c(
  "0" = "#bdbdbd",
  setNames(grDevices::hcl.colors(length(non_noise_levels), palette = "Dark 3"), non_noise_levels)
)

spatial_map <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  df_spatial_plot,
  ggplot2::aes(x = x_km, y = y_km, color = cluster_label)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.6) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = non_noise_assignments,
    ggplot2::aes(x = centroid_x_km, y = centroid_y_km, label = spatial_cluster),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.2,
    fontface = "bold",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Phase 7 DBSCAN Spatial Hotspots",
    x = "Projected x (km)",
    y = "Projected y (km)",
    color = "Cluster"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal()

print(spatial_map)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "phase7_spatial_hotspot_map.png"),
  plot = spatial_map,
  width = 8,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r phase-7-spatial-density-heatmap, fig.height=5.5, fig.width=8}
spatial_density_heatmap <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  df_spatial_plot,
  ggplot2::aes(
    x = x_km,
    y = y_km,
    fill = after_stat(log10(count + 1))
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_bin2d(bins = 100) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = non_noise_assignments,
    ggplot2::aes(x = centroid_x_km, y = centroid_y_km),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    shape = 21,
    size = 2.6,
    stroke = 0.5,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = non_noise_assignments,
    ggplot2::aes(x = centroid_x_km, y = centroid_y_km, label = spatial_cluster),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3,
    fontface = "bold",
    nudge_y = 0.6
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "C",
    name = "log10(bin\ncount + 1)"
  ) +
  ggplot2::coord_equal() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Phase 7 Long Island Spatial Density Heatmap",
    subtitle = "Heat intensity shows accident concentration; numbered markers show hotspot centroids",
    x = "Projected x (km)",
    y = "Projected y (km)"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank()
  )

print(spatial_density_heatmap)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "phase7_spatial_density_heatmap.png"),
  plot = spatial_density_heatmap,
  width = 8,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r phase-7-summary}
phase_7_summary <- data.table(
  checkpoint = c(
    "kNN distance plot saved",
    "eps trials saved",
    "DBSCAN solution created",
    "Corridor assignments saved",
    "Spatial hotspot map saved",
    "Spatial density heatmap saved"
  ),
  status = c(
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase7_knn_distance_plot.png")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase7_eps_trials.csv")),
    exists("db_result"),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase7_corridor_assignments.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase7_spatial_hotspot_map.png")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase7_spatial_density_heatmap.png"))
  )
)

fwrite(phase_7_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase7_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(phase_7_summary, caption = "Phase 7 readiness summary")
```

# Phase 8: Post-Clustering Interpretation

This phase joins the scenario and spatial cluster labels back to the working data and builds the interpretation tables used for the final report.

```{r phase-8-label-joining}
kp_final <- selected_model
db_final <- db_result

if (length(kp_final$cluster) != nrow(df_phase3)) {
  stop("Scenario cluster labels do not match the Phase 3 data rows.")
}

if (length(db_final$cluster) != nrow(df_phase3)) {
  stop("Spatial cluster labels do not match the Phase 3 data rows.")
}

df_clustered <- copy(df_phase3)
df_clustered[, scenario_cluster := as.integer(kp_final$cluster)]
df_clustered[, spatial_cluster := as.integer(db_final$cluster)]

label_join_check <- data.table(
  metric = c(
    "Rows in clustered data",
    "Scenario labels",
    "Spatial labels",
    "Scenario label NAs",
    "Spatial label NAs"
  ),
  value = c(
    nrow(df_clustered),
    length(kp_final$cluster),
    length(db_final$cluster),
    sum(is.na(df_clustered$scenario_cluster)),
    sum(is.na(df_clustered$spatial_cluster))
  )
)

if (any(label_join_check[metric %in% c("Scenario label NAs", "Spatial label NAs"), value > 0])) {
  stop("Phase 8 label joining produced missing cluster labels.")
}

fwrite(label_join_check, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_label_join_check.csv"))

knitr::kable(label_join_check, caption = "Phase 8 label join check")
```

```{r phase-8-severity-profile}
dataset_sev4_pct <- round(100 * mean(as.integer(df_clustered$Severity) == 4), 2)
dataset_sev34_pct <- round(100 * mean(as.integer(df_clustered$Severity) %in% c(3, 4)), 2)

scenario_severity_profile <- df_clustered[, .(
  n = .N,
  sev1_pct = round(100 * mean(as.integer(Severity) == 1), 2),
  sev2_pct = round(100 * mean(as.integer(Severity) == 2), 2),
  sev3_pct = round(100 * mean(as.integer(Severity) == 3), 2),
  sev4_pct = round(100 * mean(as.integer(Severity) == 4), 2),
  sev34_pct = round(100 * mean(as.integer(Severity) %in% c(3, 4)), 2)
), by = scenario_cluster][order(scenario_cluster)]

scenario_severity_profile[, high_risk_archetype := (
  sev4_pct >= (1.5 * dataset_sev4_pct) |
    sev34_pct == max(sev34_pct)
)]

# v2.0: Add explicit Sev4 rate and ratio-to-baseline columns
scenario_severity_profile[, sev4_rate       := sev4_pct]
scenario_severity_profile[, sev4_vs_baseline := round(sev4_pct / dataset_sev4_pct, 2)]

# v2.0: Prepend a baseline row (scenario_cluster = 0) for easy comparison
baseline_severity_row <- data.table(
  scenario_cluster = 0L,
  n                = nrow(df_clustered),
  sev1_pct         = round(100 * mean(as.integer(df_clustered$Severity) == 1), 2),
  sev2_pct         = round(100 * mean(as.integer(df_clustered$Severity) == 2), 2),
  sev3_pct         = round(100 * mean(as.integer(df_clustered$Severity) == 3), 2),
  sev4_pct         = dataset_sev4_pct,
  sev34_pct        = dataset_sev34_pct,
  high_risk_archetype = FALSE,
  sev4_rate        = dataset_sev4_pct,
  sev4_vs_baseline = 1.00
)

severity_profile_v2 <- rbind(baseline_severity_row, scenario_severity_profile, fill = TRUE)

fwrite(severity_profile_v2, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_severity_profile_v2.csv"))
fwrite(scenario_severity_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_scenario_severity_profile.csv"))

knitr::kable(
  severity_profile_v2,
  caption = paste(
    "Phase 8 severity profile (v2.0).",
    "Row 0 = dataset baseline.",
    "sev4_vs_baseline = cluster Sev4 rate / baseline Sev4 rate."
  )
)
```

```{r phase-8-county-profile}
scenario_county_profile <- df_clustered[, .(
  n = .N,
  Nassau_pct = round(100 * mean(County == "Nassau"), 2),
  Suffolk_pct = round(100 * mean(County == "Suffolk"), 2),
  Queens_pct = round(100 * mean(County == "Queens"), 2),
  dominant_county = mode_value(County)
), by = scenario_cluster][order(scenario_cluster)]

fwrite(scenario_county_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_scenario_county_profile.csv"))

knitr::kable(scenario_county_profile, caption = "Phase 8 county composition by scenario cluster")
```

```{r phase-8-weather-time-profile}
scenario_weather_time_profile <- df_clustered[, .(
  n = .N,
  dominant_weather_group = mode_value(weather_group),
  dominant_weather_share = round(100 * dominant_share(weather_group), 2),
  dominant_hour_band = mode_value(hour_band),
  dominant_hour_share = round(100 * dominant_share(hour_band), 2),
  night_pct = round(100 * mean(Sunrise_Sunset == "Night"), 2),
  weekend_pct = round(100 * mean(weekend), 2),
  mean_temperature = round(mean(`Temperature(F)`), 2),
  mean_visibility = round(mean(`Visibility(mi)`), 2),
  mean_wind_speed = round(mean(`Wind_Speed(mph)`), 2),
  junction_pct = round(100 * mean(Junction == "TRUE"), 2),
  traffic_signal_pct = round(100 * mean(Traffic_Signal == "TRUE"), 2),
  crossing_pct = round(100 * mean(Crossing == "TRUE"), 2),
  stop_pct = round(100 * mean(Stop == "TRUE"), 2)
), by = scenario_cluster][order(scenario_cluster)]

fwrite(scenario_weather_time_profile, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_scenario_weather_time_profile.csv"))

knitr::kable(scenario_weather_time_profile, caption = "Phase 8 weather and time profile by scenario cluster")
```

```{r phase-8-spatial-scenario-crosstab}
scenario_name_lookup <- copy(cluster_profile_summary)[
  , .(
    scenario_cluster = as.integer(as.character(cluster)),
    working_name
  )
]

spatial_scenario_crosstab <- df_clustered[spatial_cluster > 0, .N, by = .(spatial_cluster, scenario_cluster)][
  order(spatial_cluster, -N, scenario_cluster)
][
  , spatial_cluster_pct := round(100 * N / sum(N), 2), by = spatial_cluster
]

spatial_scenario_crosstab <- merge(
  spatial_scenario_crosstab,
  non_noise_assignments[, .(spatial_cluster, corridor_label)],
  by = "spatial_cluster",
  all.x = TRUE
)

spatial_scenario_crosstab <- merge(
  spatial_scenario_crosstab,
  scenario_name_lookup,
  by = "scenario_cluster",
  all.x = TRUE
)

spatial_scenario_dominance <- spatial_scenario_crosstab[
  order(spatial_cluster, -N, scenario_cluster)
][
  , .SD[1], by = spatial_cluster
][
  , .(
    spatial_cluster,
    corridor_label,
    dominant_scenario_cluster = scenario_cluster,
    dominant_scenario_name = working_name,
    dominant_count = N,
    dominant_pct = spatial_cluster_pct
  )
]

fwrite(spatial_scenario_crosstab, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_spatial_scenario_crosstab.csv"))
fwrite(spatial_scenario_dominance, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_spatial_scenario_dominance.csv"))

knitr::kable(spatial_scenario_crosstab, caption = "Phase 8 spatial-scenario cross-tabulation")
knitr::kable(spatial_scenario_dominance, caption = "Phase 8 dominant scenario by spatial hotspot")
```

```{r phase-8-final-naming}
scenario_final_names <- merge(
  scenario_weather_time_profile,
  scenario_severity_profile[, .(scenario_cluster, sev4_pct, high_risk_archetype)],
  by = "scenario_cluster",
  all.x = TRUE
)

scenario_final_names <- merge(
  scenario_final_names,
  scenario_name_lookup,
  by = "scenario_cluster",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# v2.0: Diagnostic print — inspect all profile values before naming
# so any cluster falling through to the generic fallback is visible.
cat("=== Phase 8 Cluster Profile Values for Naming Diagnostics ===\n")
print(scenario_final_names[, .(
  scenario_cluster, dominant_hour_band, dominant_weather_group,
  night_pct, weekend_pct, junction_pct, traffic_signal_pct
)])
cat("=============================================================\n")

scenario_final_names[, final_name := dplyr::case_when(
  # Tier 1: Extreme weather
  dominant_weather_group == "Snow_Ice" ~
    "Winter Adverse --- Snow and Ice",

  # Tier 2: Night + hazardous visibility
  night_pct >= 50 &
    dominant_weather_group %in% c("Fog_Haze", "Rain", "Thunderstorm") ~
    "Night Low-Visibility --- Fog and Rain",

  # Tier 3: Night / early morning (any weather)
  night_pct >= 50 & dominant_hour_band == "Early_AM" ~
    paste("Night / Early AM ---", gsub("_", " ", dominant_weather_group)),

  # Tier 4: Weekend surface road
  weekend_pct >= 40 & traffic_signal_pct >= 8 ~
    "Weekend Surface Road --- Signal Heavy",

  # Tier 5: Rush-hour corridor
  dominant_hour_band %in% c("AM_Rush", "PM_Rush") & junction_pct >= 10 ~
    paste(
      gsub("_", " ", dominant_weather_group),
      gsub("_", " ", dominant_hour_band),
      "--- Junction Heavy"
    ),

  # Tier 6 (v2.0): Cloudy off-peak daytime — captures generic midday clusters
  dominant_weather_group == "Cloudy" &
    dominant_hour_band %in% c("Midday", "Evening") ~
    paste("Cloudy Off-Peak ---", gsub("_", " ", dominant_hour_band)),

  # Tier 7 (v2.0): Clear off-peak daytime
  dominant_weather_group == "Clear" &
    dominant_hour_band %in% c("Midday", "Evening") ~
    paste("Clear Off-Peak ---", gsub("_", " ", dominant_hour_band)),

  # Fallback: more informative than bare cluster number
  TRUE ~
    paste(
      "Mixed Conditions ---",
      gsub("_", " ", dominant_weather_group),
      gsub("_", " ", dominant_hour_band)
    )
)]

scenario_final_names[, final_name := ifelse(
  high_risk_archetype,
  paste(final_name, "(High Risk)"),
  final_name
)]

duplicate_scenario_names <- scenario_final_names[, .N, by = final_name][N > 1, final_name]
if (length(duplicate_scenario_names) > 0) {
  scenario_final_names[final_name %in% duplicate_scenario_names, final_name := paste0(final_name, " (S", scenario_cluster, ")")]
}

spatial_final_names <- rbind(
  data.table(
    spatial_cluster = 0L,
    corridor_label = "Noise / Unassigned",
    final_name = "Noise / Unassigned"
  ),
  non_noise_assignments[, .(
    spatial_cluster,
    corridor_label,
    final_name = ifelse(
      corridor_label == "Surface Road Cluster",
      paste("Surface Road Cluster", spatial_cluster),
      paste(corridor_label, "Cluster", spatial_cluster)
    )
  )]
)

scenario_name_map <- scenario_final_names$final_name
names(scenario_name_map) <- scenario_final_names$scenario_cluster

spatial_name_map <- spatial_final_names$final_name
names(spatial_name_map) <- spatial_final_names$spatial_cluster

df_clustered[, scenario_cluster_name := scenario_name_map[as.character(scenario_cluster)]]
df_clustered[, spatial_cluster_name := spatial_name_map[as.character(spatial_cluster)]]

if ("working_name" %in% names(spatial_scenario_crosstab)) {
  spatial_scenario_crosstab[, working_name := NULL]
}
spatial_scenario_crosstab <- merge(
  spatial_scenario_crosstab,
  scenario_final_names[, .(scenario_cluster, final_name)],
  by = "scenario_cluster",
  all.x = TRUE
)

spatial_scenario_dominance <- merge(
  spatial_scenario_dominance[, !c("dominant_scenario_name"), with = FALSE],
  scenario_final_names[, .(scenario_cluster, final_name)],
  by.x = "dominant_scenario_cluster",
  by.y = "scenario_cluster",
  all.x = TRUE
)
data.table::setnames(spatial_scenario_dominance, "final_name", "dominant_scenario_name")

fwrite(spatial_scenario_crosstab, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_spatial_scenario_crosstab.csv"))
fwrite(spatial_scenario_dominance, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_spatial_scenario_dominance.csv"))

fwrite(scenario_final_names, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_scenario_final_names.csv"))
fwrite(spatial_final_names, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_spatial_final_names.csv"))

knitr::kable(scenario_final_names, caption = "Phase 8 final scenario cluster names")
knitr::kable(spatial_final_names, caption = "Phase 8 final spatial cluster names")
```

```{r phase-8-summary}
phase_8_summary <- data.table(
  checkpoint = c(
    "Label join saved",
    "Severity profile saved",
    "County profile saved",
    "Weather-time profile saved",
    "Spatial-scenario cross-tab saved",
    "Final cluster names saved",
    "Scenario names are unique"
  ),
  status = c(
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase8_label_join_check.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase8_scenario_severity_profile.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase8_scenario_county_profile.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase8_scenario_weather_time_profile.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase8_spatial_scenario_crosstab.csv")),
    file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase8_scenario_final_names.csv")) &
      file.exists(file.path(output_dir, "phase8_spatial_final_names.csv")),
    uniqueN(scenario_final_names$final_name) == nrow(scenario_final_names)
  )
)

fwrite(phase_8_summary, file.path(output_dir, "phase8_summary.csv"))

knitr::kable(phase_8_summary, caption = "Phase 8 readiness summary")
```

# Phase 9: Export and Visualization

This phase organizes the report-ready figures, tables, and labeled dataset export so the final write-up can pull from a single output location.

```{r phase-9-export-setup}
figure_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "figures")
table_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "tables")
interactive_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "interactive")

dir.create(figure_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(interactive_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

export_setup <- data.table(
```
